entries.title: Thrive Holdings Raises $2 Billion to Buy and Rewire Services Firms With AI
entries.summary: A group of major artificial intelligence (AI) investors is pooling capital into a vehicle designed to buy up traditional services businesses and transform them using AI. Thrive Holdings, a one-year-old holding company started by OpenAI investor Thrive Capital, is raising around $2 billion from Altimeter Capital, D1 Capital Partners and SoftBank, according to a person […] The post Thrive Hold

entries.title: Google Expands AI Training to Include User-Uploaded Media to Search Tools
entries.summary: Google has expanded the scope of data it collects to train its artificial intelligence models, now incorporating media uploaded by users across several of its primary search-related services. The policy change, Engadget reported Monday (July 6), was implemented without much public fanfare and allows the technology giant to use images, audio, video and other files […] The post Google Expands

entries.title: US Treasury Report Warns AI Bubble Could Trigger Economic Shockwaves
entries.summary: The U.S. Department of the Treasury has produced a draft report warning of extensive risks to the economy if the artificial intelligence market repeats what happened when the dotcom bubble burst 25 years ago, according to NOTUS, which obtained a copy of the document. Career Treasury analysts found that AI firms are more deeply entrenched […] The post US Treasury Report Warns AI Bubble Could

entries.title: White House Signals More Hands-On Approach to Oversight of AI Systems
entries.summary: From hands-off to hands-on. The Trump administration increasingly is taking a direct role in overseeing the release of the most powerful artificial intelligence (AI) models, marking a sharp turnaround from its previous policy of removing regulations that might hamper U.S. development of the technology. Last week, the White House lifted the export restrictions it had […] The post White House

entries.title: Santander publishes AI projects on GitHub
entries.summary: Banco Santander has shared a host of its AI projects under an open source licence in a bid to "ramp up shared innovation".

entries.title: DNB goes live on nCino platform for corporate lending business
entries.summary: nCino, Inc. (NASDAQ: NCNO), the platform for agentic AI banking, today announced that DNB has gone live on the nCino Platform, powering its corporate lending business, with plans to extend to SME lending next year.

entries.title: Bluevine launches US business banking offering for India-resident business owners
entries.summary: Bluevine, the largest digital banking platform for small businesses in the U.S.*, today announced the launch of its US business banking solutions for eligible India-resident owners of U.S.-registered businesses**.

entries.title: The Three Factors for a Fast Modernisation Journey
entries.summary: Joining the studio at Temenos Community Forum 2026, Mark Yamin Ali, Managing Director, Europe, Temenos and Lydie Specque, President and CEO, FIFA Clearing House spoke to FinextraTV about lessons learn from a unique modernisation journey. Beginning by providing some context to the legacy position they were previously in, Specque defines their model as initially transaction-oriented before needing t

entries.title: Standard Chartered enables institutional clients to access USDC minting and redemption
entries.summary: Standard Chartered today announced the launch of its capability enabling institutional clients to access USDC minting and redemption, developed in partnership with Circle Internet Group, Inc. (Circle) (NYSE: CRCL), the issuer of USDC1 through its regulated entities.

entries.title: BBVA completes first agent-initiated transaction
entries.summary: BBVA has completed a transaction initiated by an artificial intelligence agent on behalf of a cardholder, as part of a live agentic commerce activity that Visa is developing in Europe under its Visa Agentic Ready programme.

entries.title: The B2B payments infrastructure gap: Most platforms weren’t built for agentic AI
entries.summary: Legacy B2B tech stacks were designed to be compatible with automation — not today’s agentic AI.
